data.author: Justus Braun [Allied Vision]
data.message:
Pull request #20: Feature/add pixel format test

Merge in HSW_SDK/vimbax_ros2_driver from feature/add-pixel-format-test to dev

* commit '2d395620621f8f18bec666c8e7a949c005de87ea':
  test_invalid_pixel_format now expects the proper error code to be returned
  Fixed pull request comments
  Format to comply with ament_pep257
  Format code to match styleguide
  Created custom Node for the test and use pytest fixture to init and shutdown rcl
  Added PixelFormat test
